title: Piquant Charred Mediterranean Zucchini Kebabs
description: Spicy, charred zucchini skewers with Mediterranean spices, perfect for a low-carb, sugar‑free dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to high heat (around 450°F) and brush the grates with oil.
Slice zucchini into 1-inch thick rounds and set aside.
Whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, oregano, garlic powder, cumin, salt, pepper, and lemon juice to make a rub.
Thread two slices of zucchini onto each skewer, alternating with a slice of red bell pepper if desired.
Brush the zucchini skewers generously with the spice rub, ensuring each piece is coated.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook, turning every 2-3 minutes, until the zucchini shows bright char marks and is tender, about 8-10 minutes total.
Remove kebabs from heat, drizzle with a few capers for briny contrast, and let rest 2 minutes.
Serve immediately with a small side of tzatziki or a squeeze of fresh lemon.
